title: kohleria stricta
intro: Kohleria stricta, also known as the 'Stricta Lipochiloides' or 'Kohleria stricta', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, primarily used for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Kohleria stricta include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and ease digestive problems. The herbal preparations of Kohleria stricta involve making teas, infusions, or tinctures from the leaves and flowers of the plant, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy.
